title: CP9 Battles in the Tower of Justice: Rising Conflict

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: My Cola Fuel is running out!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Gotta run to the kitchen now!!

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: That punk, he dodged it again!?

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: YOUR PUNCH IS A WUSSI-PUSSI PUNCH...!

dialogue.text: Nope... yours is the weaky-geeky punch.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Then yours is a flimsy- clumsy punch.

dialogue.speaker: CP9
dialogue.text: Panty is good enough for you!!!
